description: Copyability Audit Ledger v0.1 · per-decision execution validation. For every (wallet, market, side) prediction the engine made, records the predicted-follower-price at 30s delay (using real-trader proof when available · fallback to best_ask + retail-cross). When market resolves (UMA-confirmed via audit_ledger), records engine_was_right_about_copy = (follower_pnl > 0). Per-tier track record + per-decision audit trail. M1 forward-witnessed via GitHub commits + L4 OTS Bitcoin anchor. The S&P pattern for COPY decisions.
role_served: Role 1 copy-decision · Role 8 watchtower compliance · customer-facing /audit/copyability

WAIT.tier_correct_meaning: neutral · WAIT does not commit to direction

AVOID.tier_correct_meaning: follower would have lost money (AVOID was right)

caveats: Copyability tier read from CURRENT wallets_combined state · v0.1 uses current label not as-of-fill-time (acceptable for initial track record · v0.2 will snapshot tier at decision time)
Empirical proof requires another real trade in same market within 30s · fallback used when window is empty (slow markets)
Settlement comes from audit_ledger.json (UMA-confirmed) · 1:1 chain_id mapping
NOT financial advice · published track record is methodology calibration · S&P-style transparency · NOT a promise of future performance
Sample-size honest: tiers with <30 resolved marked insufficient_n=True
